data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a scheduled start time with a check-in window. However, while the linked use case mentions a scheduled start time and a check-in window, there is no concrete evidence or API checks provided that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The absence of specific details or endpoints related to the scheduled start time and check-in window indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of scheduled start time with check-in window.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scheduled start time and check-in window
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the scheduled start time and check-in window are correctly implemented and retrievable via API.
